channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 11 May: Harare overcast · high 27° / low 15°
item.description: Harare: high 27°, low 15° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 27°, low 14° (clear sky) · Mutare: high 29°, low 16° (overcast) · Gweru: high 26°, low 15° (mainly clear) · Masvingo: high 30°, low 18° (partly cloudy) · Victoria Falls: high 32°, low 16° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Zingizi gonyera pamwe maruva enyika haaperi. (Settle with one; the world’s flowers are endless.)
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
